seo.title: Apply to Registry | HeartLink
seo.description: Start a private enquiry with HeartLink. Reviewed personally, never made public, and never shown in a searchable directory.

intro.title: Start with a private conversation.
intro.description: Share the first details about the person seeking a match. HeartLink reviews every enquiry privately before recommending any next step.
intro.assuranceDescription: Your information is reviewed only by the HeartLink team and never shown in a public directory, app or searchable database.

form.introduction: Your details are reviewed privately and are never shown in a public directory.

steps.title: Who should we speak with?
steps.intro: You may enquire for yourself, your son, daughter or a close family member.

choices.label: For myself
choices.description: I am looking for a life partner

choices.label: For my family
choices.description: I am enquiring for a family member

steps.title: Tell us about the person.
steps.intro: A clear first picture helps us understand fit before any conversation moves forward.

placeholders.introduction: Personality, interests, what they are looking for and anything the family should understand...

steps.title: Tell us about the family.
steps.intro: These details help us understand background, context and comfort. They are reviewed privately.

fields.familyValues: What matters most to your family?

placeholders.familyValues: Family values, community, education, lifestyle, location preferences and what would make both families comfortable...

steps.title: How can HeartLink help?
steps.intro: Select what best matches your need. We will discuss the right option personally.

choices.label: Private Registry
choices.description: Free private consideration for selected introductions

choices.label: Success Plan
choices.description: No upfront registration fee; success-led engagement

choices.label: Premium Search
choices.description: Apply for a retained private search mandate

choices.label: Not sure yet
choices.description: Please guide us on the right option

nextSteps.title: What happens after you apply?
items: The HeartLink team reviews your enquiry privately.
If we can help, we contact the nominated representative for context.
We guide you toward Private Registry, Success Plan, Premium Search or Private Circle.

form.verificationNote: Every enquiry is reviewed by a person. HeartLink may contact the nominated representative to verify identity and understand the right service option.
form.disclaimer: Submitting this form does not guarantee acceptance into Success Plan, Premium Search or Private Circle. Private Registry submissions are added to our private database for future consideration.
form.consent: I am authorised to share these details and agree that HeartLink may review them confidentially.

faqs.question: Who will see my information?
faqs.answer: Only the HeartLink team. Your details are not published, listed, browsed or shared publicly.

faqs.question: Can a parent or relative enquire?
faqs.answer: Yes. Parents and close family members can start the enquiry.

faqs.question: What happens after submission?
faqs.answer: If we can help, HeartLink will contact the nominated representative privately for the next conversation.

faqs.question: Does submitting mean I am accepted?
faqs.answer: Not automatically. Private Registry applications are kept for future consideration. Success Plan, Premium Search and Private Circle are accepted only after review.
